topicBacklog.pageDescription: Manage backlog topics, select topics for events, and analyze usage patterns
topicBacklog.title: Topic Backlog Manager
topicBacklog.subtitle: Select topics from the backlog with intelligent suggestions and staleness detection
topicBacklog.selectPrompt: Select a topic to view details
topicBacklog.noTopics: No topics found matching your filters

details.statusGreen: Safe to reuse - last used over 12 months ago
details.statusYellow: Use with caution - last used 6-12 months ago
details.statusRed: Too recent - last used within 6 months, high duplication risk

similar.title: Similar Topics Detected
similar.message: The following topics have high similarity (>70%) with your selection. Are you sure you want to proceed?

override.title: Override Staleness Warning
override.message: This topic was used recently (staleness score: {{score}}%). Please provide justification for using it again.
override.helper: Explain why this topic should be reused despite being recent

speakerBrainstorm.title: Speaker Brainstorming
speakerBrainstorm.subtitle: Add potential speakers to the event pool and assign them to organizers for outreach

pool.title: Speaker Pool
pool.empty: No speakers in pool yet. Add some above!
